case_title: EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC F/K/A HILCO VS. MARLAYNA WASHINGTON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC F/K/A HILCO RECEIVABLES LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC F/K/A HILCO RECEIVABLES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, MARLAYNA $3,367.20 PRINCIPAL, $267.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,634.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC F/K/A HILCO RECEIVABLES LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC F/K/A HILCO RECEIVABLES LLC SERVED AUG-11-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, MARLAYNA
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS ( CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC F/K/A HILCO RECEIVABLES LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC F/K/A HILCO RECEIVABLES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, MARLAYNA DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-18-2011
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $267.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, MARLAYNA
